reforms.description: The Federal Government approved a special programme for applicants for vocational training who were registered as not having a training place, aiming to create 7000 to 8000 additional vocational training places.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the skills of the workforce, which is essential for fostering innovation and improving productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme aimed to create additional vocational training places.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative addresses a significant issue of youth unemployment by increasing vocational training opportunities, which can have a lasting impact on the labor market.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Government approved a special programme for applicants for vocational training who were registered as not having a training place on 30th September 1983 (volume: DM 160 million).
